summary: Sanitized the public Demonstrativo Basico template by removing the legacy BASE sheet and blanking MEMORIA input cells, added generator-side defensive removal of BASE before writing the individual workbook, and added Vitest coverage to prevent BASE/XLOOKUP regressions.
next: Push the PR 43 fix, wait for Vercel checks, then run authenticated Preview validation with at least two real units and human Excel review.

summary: Merged origin/main into PR 43 after PR 44 corrected the Supabase project ref and removed the tracked .env. The branch now points supabase/config.toml to raluxyojqosfzrfozmpz and contains no active refs to the old Lovable Supabase projects.

openpyxl inspection of public and dist templates

summary: Authenticated smoke at the Preview revealed two real UI bugs not caught by tsc/test/lint/build: (1) /escolas table with column drift (header and body cells misaligned visually), and (2) DocumentsPanel triggered by /escolas Gerar documentos button showed a green toast.success but did NOT actually download the .xlsx because the panel was still a setTimeout(1100)+toast.success mock and never wired to the real generator.
next: Diagnose root causes, apply fix in worktree, validate via authenticated Playwright smoke before committing.

summary: Root causes confirmed via source code reading: (a) /escolas table drift caused by motion.tr + AnimatePresence + .row-accent (pseudo-element absolute inside <tr>) - regression of fix baceb7735e (2026-04-30); (b) DocumentsPanel never integrated to real generator. Applied Option B fix in the dedicated worktree: DocumentsPanel now receives unidadeId, uses useUnidadeDetalhe, calls generateDemonstrativoBasico + saveAs. Escolas.tsx now uses native TableRow + table-fixed + colgroup. .row-accent CSS class deleted entirely from src/index.css.
validations: Playwright authenticated smoke against http://localhost:8080 with wilsonmp2@gmail.com (6/6 checks: login 200, /escolas 163 rows, header 5 cols == body 5 cols, 2 .xlsx generated, MEMORIA filled, no BASE sheet, no #REF/#VALUE/#NAME, no BASE!/XLOOKUP formula refs)
next: Commit on feat/demonstrativo-basico-individual, push, wait for Vercel Preview, then run smoke against Preview.

summary: Committed and pushed the UI integration fix: 5 files changed, 215 insertions, 62 deletions. New file src/components/DocumentsPanel.test.tsx. Vercel rebuild triggered.
next: Wait for Vercel Preview build and re-run authenticated smoke against the Preview URL.
